events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing box extension on a deep finish is a **fail** — it violates NEC 314.20/314.21 setback limits (box must be flush with combustible finishes or within 1/4 in. of noncombustible finishes), with knock-on effects on box fill (314.16) and free-conductor length (300.14). Corrective action is to install a properly sized extension ring and re-inspect before closeout.
